name: Ryan Baumann
role: Head of Developer Experience, Google Maps Platform
intro: I run Developer Experience for Google Maps Platform — and I still ship. 15+ years building developer platforms at Google, Mapbox, and Instabase, across engineering, product, and go-to-market. This is my home page: the work, the writing, and a lab of live apps I build and operate myself.
headline: Developer experience is a growth engine, not a support function. Every entry here starts from the number it moved.
description: Ryan Baumann — Head of Developer Experience at Google Maps Platform. Engineer, builder, and product leader with 15+ years scaling developer platforms at Google, Mapbox, and Instabase.
aboutTeaser: First customer-facing engineer at Mapbox (grew the team 1→15 as the company passed $100M ARR), Director at Series-B Instabase, industrial IoT at Caterpillar (3 patents), and before all of it, two years as a professional cyclist. Racing taught me pacing, measurement, and marginal gains — every job since has been applying them.

sectionIntros.work: Selected platform, product, and growth work. Each entry starts from the goal it served — adoption, revenue, reach — and shows what shipped.
sectionIntros.writing: Long-form notes on developer experience as a growth discipline, applied AI, and building platforms agents can use. The weekly cadence — #ThisWeeksLearnings — lives on LinkedIn.
sectionIntros.talks: Talks, videos, and decks. I present demo-first: working product over slides, then how it's built, then why it matters to the business.
sectionIntros.demos: Live apps I build and operate to stay in the work — real OAuth, real quotas, real cold starts. One container, one Cloud Run service, no secrets in the browser.
